channel.title: Etcd on Curiosity
channel.description: Recent content in Etcd on Curiosity

item.title: Etcd Performance Test
item.description:
Performance

instruction

https://etcd.io/docs/v3.4.0/benchmarks/etcd-3-demo-benchmarks/

issues

error info

etcdserver: mvcc: database space exceeded

solution

https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/issues/11947 https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/blob/master/Documentation/op-guide/maintenance.md#space-quota https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/issues/10312

performance test

etcd-proxy

with the high pressure test the proxy not take much resource usage, the request can be set like 0.2c,50m limit can be set like 0.3,100m
